title: ServuxForged
description: Servux unofficial (Neo)Forge port. A server-side mod that provides extra support/features for some client-side mods when playing on a server.
body:
# ServuxForged

**This mod requires [BadPackets](https://modrinth.com/mod/badpackets) in 1.20.4 ~ 1.20.6 and 1.21.x-0.2.1 below.**

**This mod is still in the testing phase and is not yet stable.**

Servux unofficial (Neo)Forge port.

ServuxForged is a server-side mod that provides extra support/features for some client-side mods when playing on a server.

**ServuxForged itself is never needed on the clients or in single player**,
it's only needed/useful on the dedicated server side in multiplayer.

## Features
In version 0.1.x it only has one feature, which is sending structure bounding box data to BoccHUD when it asks for it, so that it can render the structure bounding boxes also in multiplayer.

There are a lot more features planned later on, at which point there will also be commands to turn features on or off. Currently in 0.1.x since there is only one feature, there are no commands yet. If you want the structure bounding box support, install the mod. Otherwise don't.
